g.text: Note: FORM is a typo — should be FROM
Tokenizer succeeds — FORM is a valid identifier
FORM is NOT a keyword — classified as IDENTIFIER

div.p: Parse error at line 1, col 10: expected 'FROM', got 'FORM'

g.text: sql_parse() returns NULL — no AST produced

text.tspan: Key Insight: FORM passes tokenization (valid identifier)
but fails parsing (wrong token type at wrong position)

g.text: tok->type == TOK_KEYWORD? NO — tok->type is TOK_IDENTIFIER

div.p: SELECT * FORM users ^^^^ col 10: expected keyword 'FROM'
